title: Payments: Google Play Billing + Supabase verification
summary: Google Play Billing skeleton mevcut. BillingManager ve SubscriptionViewModel calisiyor. startSubscriptionPurchase noop — Supabase Edge Function verify-purchase yazilmali, sonra RepositoryImpl guncellenmeli.

decisions.decision: iyzico/Stripe kapsam disi — sadece Google Play Billing MVP
decisions.reason: Play Billing skeleton hazir, iyzico entegrasyonu ayri sprint gerektirir
decisions.impact: SubscriptionRepositoryImpl sadece Google Play donusu isle

decisions.decision: Server-side dogrulama zorunlu — client trust yok
decisions.impact: Supabase Edge Function verify-purchase gerekli; GOOGLE_PLAY_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY secret gerekli

openQuestions: SubscriptionScreen Activity ref nasil aliyor? LocalContext.current as? Activity?
Google Play Developer API service account key nerede saklanacak?
nextActions: researcher: SubscriptionScreen Activity ref + SupabaseDataSource method signatures kontrol
